title: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
summary_full: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting  between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
summary_public: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting  between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
